urdu transliteration text:
Ay meri Bibi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Tere dar pe istighasa he,
tera mamnoon meri shehzadi ye jaha sara hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We are praying at your door, the entire Universe is grateful to you.

urdu transliteration text:
Tu hame hifz or amaan dede,
apni chadar ke saiban dede
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Give us peace and security,Give us shelter under your cloak

urdu transliteration text:
Teri kudrat me kya nahi bibi,
tu jise chahe do jahaan dede
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: What is not in your power  O Bibi? If you wish, you can grant us this world and the hereafter

urdu transliteration text:
Tujko ummat ne yu sataaya hai,
marghe mohsin pe bhi rulaaya hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The Ummah has troubled you, the death of Mohsin made you cry

urdu transliteration text:
Tujko baba ke baad ummat ne,
haaye darbaar me bulaaya hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: After the death of your father,they humiliated you by calling you to the court

urdu transliteration text:
Ay meri Bibi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Aansu-o mein dua mangi hai,
teri tasbeeh hi parhke dil ne tuje pukaara hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We have asked for our desires with tearful eyes, we have recited your tasbeeh and our hearts have called out to you

urdu transliteration text:
Farshe majlis pe aur musalle par,
har jawaa keh raha hai roro kar
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: At a majlis or on the musalla,every youth is crying out

urdu transliteration text:
Ham rahe na rahe magar bibi,
ta qayamat rahe gham-e-sarwar
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: O Bibi, whether we remain or not, the sorrow of Hussain will remain forever

urdu transliteration text:
Un shaheedo ka ye mukadar hai,
sayibaan inka teri chadar hai,
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Alas! What destiny awaits those martyrs have who are under theshelter of your cloak

urdu transliteration text:
Unke sino pe ay meri bibi,
daaghe maatam nishaane haider hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The marks of Matam that are evident on their chests, are their symbols of bravery.

urdu transliteration text:
Ay meri Bibi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Tere darpe sar jhukaa te hai,
har husayni ka tere tukro pe hi guzaara hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We have come humbly to your door, every Husayni is obliged to you for everything
